_README: Critter ROLES — each critter belongs to one of four roles. Role determines building effectiveness. Matching role = +30%, mismatch = -60%. Special canSwim flag preserved on Chef types that live near water.

enhancer.name: Enhancer
enhancer.desc: Support & magic. Passive lab, healer, doctrine building.

gatherer.name: Gatherer
gatherer.desc: Resource extraction. Storage, mines, refineries, workbench.
